articles.title: Gill misses chance to top Orange Cap table, Rabada on the rise on Purple Cap list
articles.description: Here's what the Orange and Purple Cap tables at IPL 2026 look like after Mumbai Indians' dominant win over Gujarat Titans on Monday

articles.title: Bumrah bowls the first over, and 'it just kicks belief' into MI
articles.description: Jasprit Bumrah bowled the first ball of a match in IPL 2026 for the first time against Gujarat Titans on Monday, and struck straightaway, breaking his duck in the process

articles.title: Tilak ends MI's losing streak with 45-ball century
articles.description: It was the joint-quickest hundred by an MI batter, equalling Sanath Jayasuriya's effort from 2008

articles.title: Moni, Sharmin help Bangladesh register maiden ODI win against Sri Lanka
articles.description: Bangladesh lost four wickets for one run when they were close to the finish line, but averted disaster in the end

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Five UAE cricketers given citizenship through naturalisation
articles.description: Khuzaima Tanveer, Ajay Kumar, Akshdeep Nath, Harpreet Bhatia and Adeeb Usmani are the players with UAE citizenship

articles.title: Sarfaraz appointed head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
articles.description: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room

articles.title: ECB to review injury replacements rule after fresh round of criticism
articles.description: Lancashire baffled after Tom Bailey turned down as like-for-like replacement for Ajeet Singh Dale

articles.title: San Francisco Unicorns join Global Super League to complete line-up
articles.description: The five teams to compete in the GSL this year will be Unicorns, Lahore Qalandars, Guyana Amazon Warriors, Desert Vipers and Perth Scorchers

articles.title: Rwanda to host inaugural ICC Women's Challenge Trophy from April 18
articles.description: Italy, Nepal, Vanuatu and USA are the other teams in contention at the tournament

articles.title: Canada T20 World Cup match under ICC corruption investigation
articles.description: A new documentary aired on Friday makes claims about an over bowled by captain Dilpreet Bajwa against New Zealand

articles.title: Kiran Powar appointed as Assam’s head coach for 2026-27 Ranji season
articles.description: Powar, who has represented Mumbai, Baroda, and Assam during his playing career, brings valuable domestic experience to the role.

articles.title: 'Handled that very badly' - Sanjay Manjrekar not impressed with CSK moving on from MS Dhoni's captaincy
articles.description: The former India skipper is yet to feature for the Super Kings as he nurses a calf issue.
